brand.name: Avalanche
brand.tagline: Your premium lounge in Dortmund. Shisha, cocktails, food & unforgettable nights.

home.aboutText: Welcome to Avalanche, your premium lounge destination in Dortmund. We blend oriental warmth with modern elegance to create an atmosphere that feels like nowhere else. Handcrafted cocktails, premium shisha, great food, and an energy that builds through the night. Whether you're here to unwind or celebrate — this is your place.
home.aboutText2: Handcrafted cocktails, premium shisha, great food, and an energy that builds through the night. Whether you're here to unwind or celebrate — this is your place.
home.ctaBannerText: Reserve your table now — or just show up and let the night take you.

shisha.title: Premium Shisha
shisha.desc: 8+ flavours. Premium tobacco. Coal refreshes included.

cocktails.title: Cocktails & Bar
cocktails.desc: Signature creations and classic favourites. Mixed to perfection.

food.title: Kitchen & Bites
food.desc: From loaded fries to wagyu burgers. Food that hits.

menu.title: Our Menu
menu.subtitle: Cocktails, mocktails, coffee, food — and of course, premium shisha.
menu.shishaDesc: Premium tobacco & coal. Coal refreshes and your choice of mouthpiece included.

shishaFlavoursList.doubleApple_arabic: Classic sweet apple blend — our bestseller.
shishaFlavoursList.grapeMint_arabic: Fresh grape with cool mint finish.
shishaFlavoursList.lemonMint_arabic: Zesty citrus with a minty punch.
shishaFlavoursList.roseGold_arabic: Floral rose with a hint of vanilla.

events.title: Events
events.privateEventsDesc: Got a group? Birthday, bachelor, corporate — we've got the space and the vibe.
events.eventFallback1Desc: Every Thursday — free cocktail for every lady. Good vibes all night.
events.eventFallback2Desc: Friday nights — live DJ sets from 22:00. Dance until 5am.
events.eventFallback3Desc: Show off your cloud game. Prizes for the biggest, most creative blows.
events.eventFallback4Desc: Oriental music, special shisha blends, and a menu from the heart.

reservation.title: Reservation
reservation.success: Request sent! We'll confirm your reservation shortly.
reservation.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or call us directly.
reservation.confirmation: We'll confirm your reservation by email within 24 hours.
